/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/gl_helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/opengl_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/Programs/example.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/Programs/light.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/Programs/shadow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/Programs/skybox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/Programs/rain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/Programs/smoke.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/Programs/MiniMapProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/Programs/GeometryProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/Programs/bloom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RacingGame.dir/car.cpp.o -o ../bin/RacingGame  -Wl,-rpath,/home/howard_yu/Codes/CG/Final/bin ../bin/libglfw.so.3.4
